rationale: Despite an IIT Bombay M.Sc in AI, the entire career is at Wipro in Mechanical Engineer/Customer Support/Content Writer roles with no ML, IR, or retrieval engineering work, plus employment at fictional company Dunder Mifflin — zero relevant technical depth for a Senior AI Engineer role.

3.3 years of experience entirely at IT-services firms (Mindtree, Wipro, Infosys) doing web/API and QA work, with only self-learner AI exposure (RAG side project, online courses) and no production IR/retrieval or ranking systems shipped.

Career history consists of content writing/SEO at fictional company Wayne Enterprises and accounting/project management at TCS, with no ML or engineering work, and employment at fictional companies (Wayne Enterprises, Pied Piper) signals a honeypot profile.

3.7 years in Customer Support at fictional company Wayne Enterprises and Accountant roles with a Civil Engineering M.E. degree — no technical engineering, ML, or IR experience whatsoever and employment at a fictional company confirms honeypot.

Content Writer and Customer Support roles at Dunder Mifflin (fictional) and Project Manager roles with no ML work, despite M.Tech AI and Ph.D ML credentials — career history completely mismatches claimed education and contains fictional employer (Dunder Mifflin), confirming honeypot.

Operations Manager, Accountant, Sales Executive, and Graphic Designer career history at Stark Industries (fictional) and Pied Piper (fictional) with no engineering or ML work — pure non-technical background with fictional employers confirming honeypot status.

3 years as a Data Engineer at Dream11 (product company) with XGBoost/sklearn ML exposure and strong NLP/Feature Engineering skills, but the role is primarily data pipelines (~70%) with only lightweight ML and no demonstrated production IR/retrieval/ranking systems or evaluation metric ownership.

4.7 years primarily in cloud/frontend engineering across Acme Corp, TCS (IT services), and fictional Wayne Enterprises with self-learner AI exposure only — strong Weights & Biases endorsements are mismatched against a career showing no production ML, retrieval, or ranking work.

5.4 years with Zomato (product company, 4.25 yrs) giving meaningful product-company experience, BM25 intermediate skill, and advanced Fine-tuning LLMs exposure, but career descriptions show QA/testing and full-stack web work with no demonstrated production IR/ranking system or evaluation framework ownership.

Content Writer career entirely at fictional companies (Pied Piper, Stark Industries, Initech) with mechanical engineering and operations descriptions that contradict the titles — classic honeypot with zero relevant ML, IR, or engineering experience.
